description_long: This is a metallic adjustable wrench with a robust, slightly weathered appearance. The tool features a long, straight handle with a rounded end that includes a hole for hanging or storage. The head of the wrench is broad and houses an adjustable jaw mechanism, allowing it to grip fasteners of various sizes. The surface of the wrench is dark gray with a mottled, textured finish, suggesting heavy-duty use and durability. The adjustment screw is visible near the head, enabling precise control of the jaw width. Overall, the wrench is utilitarian and designed for practical use in mechanical or construction settings.
description: A dark gray, metallic adjustable wrench with a textured finish and a visible adjustment screw near the head.
description_view_0: The wrench is seen from above, clearly showing the adjustable jaw and the hole at the end of the handle.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the length of the handle and the side profile of the adjustable jaw.
description_view_2: A top-down, edge-on view that emphasizes the thinness of the handle and the flatness of the tool.
description_view_3: A bottom-up, edge-on view showing the underside of the wrench and the profile of the jaw mechanism.
